name: Tamale Pie (Dement)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove onions and garlic from the pan.
4. Add ground meat to the pan and cook until browned, breaking it up slightly, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Discard excess fat and liquid.
6. Return onions and garlic to the pan with the meat.
7. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
8. Transfer mixture to a casserole dish.
9. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese on top.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 1 hour.
11. If frozen, bring to room temperature before baking and add about 15 minutes to the cooking time.
